description: Feature flags and quality gates for archetype re-enablement. Start with H/K/L/S (Phase 1), then add A/E/M (Phase 2).

ob_quality.description: Minimum OB formation quality (0-1). Higher = cleaner displacement + volume.

displacement_z.description: Z-score of displacement from OB level. Higher = stronger move away from OB.

htf_alignment.description: Higher timeframe must agree with retest direction.

mitigation_state.description: OB must not be fully mitigated (price hasn't fully retraced through it).

retest_tolerance.description: Max % distance from OB level to qualify as retest (1.5% default).

min_bars_since_formation.description: OB age window - too fresh = unreliable, too old = stale.

wick_ratio.description: Wick size as % of full candle range. High wick ratio = rejection.

magnet_unmitigated.description: Target magnet level (liquidity grab) must be unmitigated.

reclaim_bars.description: Must reclaim swept level within N bars or entry invalidates.

wrong_side_eq.description: Reject if entry would be wrong side of equilibrium.

volume_confirmation.description: Wick candle should have decent volume (not thin air).

volume_spike_pctl.description: Volume must be in top 10% (spike) without structural follow-through.

structural_follow_through.description: Breakout must FAIL (no follow-through) to qualify as false break.

reclaim_bars.description: Must reclaim broken level quickly (within 3 bars).

near_vacuum.description: Works best when false break is near liquidity vacuum.

displacement_after_reclaim.description: After reclaim, expect displacement away from false break.

void_score.description: Vacuum quality score (low volume, wide spread, thin order book).

reclaim_required.description: Must reclaim swept level after engineered move.

continuation_bars.description: After reclaim, continuation should happen within N bars.

trap_within_trend.note: Currently generating 83% of trades but net loss. Need strict quality gates.

trap_quality_threshold.description: INCREASE THIS - too many low-quality traps entering. Target 0.50-0.65.

trap_confirmation_bars.description: Require more confirmation before entry to reduce false signals.

trap_volume_ratio.description: Trap must have volume spike vs recent avg. Increase to 1.5-2.5.

trap_stop_multiplier.description: CRITICAL: Tighten stops. Currently ~2.5x ATR, target 1.0-1.5x.

wrong_side_eq_reject.description: Reject traps that would enter wrong side of equilibrium.

recent_failed_trap_cooldown.description: If trap failed recently, cooldown before re-entering same archetype.

volume_exhaustion.note: Only 6 trades/3yr but 66.7% WR. Increase detection without sacrificing quality.

ve_threshold.description: Lower threshold to catch more setups. Test 0.40-0.50 range.

ve_volume_spike.description: Volume spike requirement vs avg. Can lower slightly.

global_vetoes.description: Cross-archetype vetoes that apply to all enabled archetypes

event_suppression.description: Suppress all entries during EventCalendar suppression windows (Fed, CPI, etc.)

regime_confidence_floor.description: If regime confidence < 0.45, go to CASH mode (too uncertain)

max_daily_entries.description: Circuit breaker - max entries per day to prevent overtrading

same_archetype_cooldown.description: After archetype entry, cooldown before same archetype can fire again

ablation_config.description: Config for single-archetype ablation tests to measure incremental value

week_2.test: Additive test - does K improve or cannibalize H?

week_4.acceptance: Total PF >= 2.0, WR >= 60%, combined gain >= $800/yr vs baseline
